Class ResourceHandler

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ResourceHandler
public class ResourceHandler extends Object
Auxiliary class for processing/further processing of FHIR resources.

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • ResourceHandler

      public ResourceHandler()

  • Method Details

    • handleObservationEntries

      public static void handleObservationEntries(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle bundleResponse, Collection<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Observation> observations, Set<String> patientIds, Set<String> encounterIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType)
      Reads the Fhir bundle, adds all entries of the Observation type to a list and adds the patient ids and encounter ids to a given set.
      Parameters:
      bundleResponse - A FHIR response bundle that contains Observation resources
      observations - List with FHIR-Observations in which the entries from the bundle are to be stored
      patientIds - List of ids of the Patient resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      encounterIds - List of ids of the Encounter resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      serverType - The connected server type that delivers the fhir resources.

    • removeNotNeededAttributes

      public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Observation removeNotNeededAttributes(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Observation obs)
      Removing non-needed attributes to optimize the heap space usage.

    • removeNotNeededAttributes

      public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter removeNotNeededAttributes(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter enc)
      Removing non-needed attributes to optimize the heap space usage.

    • removeNotNeededAttributes

      public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition removeNotNeededAttributes(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition cond)
      Removing non-needed attributes to optimize the heap space usage.

    • storeObservationPatientKeys

      public static void storeObservationPatientKeys(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Observation obs, Set<String> outputPatientIds, Set<String> outputEncounterIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType)
      Class for reading patient and case numbers from MiiObservation resources and filling global lists with them.
      Parameters:
      obs - The MiiObservation resource to be read.
      outputPatientIds - List of ids of the Patient resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      outputEncounterIds - List of ids of the Encounter resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      serverType - The connected server type that delivers the fhir resources.

    • storeConditionPatientKeys

      public static void storeConditionPatientKeys(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition cond, Set<String> outputPatientIds, Set<String> outputEncounterIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType)
      Class for reading patient and case numbers from MiiCondition resources and filling global lists with them.
      Parameters:
      cond - The MiiCondition resource to be read.
      outputPatientIds - List of ids of the Patient resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      outputEncounterIds - List of ids of the Encounter resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      serverType - The connected server type that delivers the fhir * resources.

    • handleConditionEntries

      public static void handleConditionEntries(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle currentBundle, List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition> conditions, Set<String> outputPatientIds, Set<String> outputEncounterIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType)
      Reads the Fhir bundle, adds all entries of the Condition type to a list and adds the patient ids and encounter ids to a given set.
      Parameters:
      currentBundle - A FHIR response bundle that contains Observation resources.
      conditions - List with FHIR-conditions in which the entries from the bundle are to be stored.
      outputPatientIds - List of ids of the Patient resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      outputEncounterIds - List of ids of the Encounter resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      serverType - The connected server type that delivers the fhir resources.

    • linkConditionsToEncounters

      public static void linkConditionsToEncounters(Collection<MiiCondition> conditions, Collection<MiiEncounter> encounters)
      Links MiiCondition instances to matching MiiEncounter objects using the reference defined in Encounter.diagnosis.condition.

      Only conditions without an existing encounter reference are processed. Only encounters where isFacilityContact() == true are considered.

      Parameters:
      conditions - conditions to process
      encounters - encounters providing diagnosis references

    • storeConditionAndEncounterResources

      public static void storeConditionAndEncounterResources(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle currentBundle, List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition> listConditions, List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter> listEncounters, ServerTypeEnum serverType)
      Storing of the Condition and Encounter resources in the submitted lists.
      Parameters:
      currentBundle - A FHIR response bundle that contains Observation and Encounter resources.
      listConditions - List with FHIR-conditions in which the entries from the bundle are to be stored.
      listEncounters - List with FHIR-conditions in which the entries from the bundle are to be stored and that are referencing on the conditions.
      serverType - The connected server type that delivers the fhir resources. At the moment just ServerTypeEnum.FHIR are supported.

    • handleConditionEntriesWithEncounterRefSetting

      public static void handleConditionEntriesWithEncounterRefSetting(List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Condition> listConditions, List<org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Encounter> listEncounters, Set<String> outputPatientIds, Set<String> outputEncounterIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType)
      Set the Encounter id in the condition resources and add the patient and encounter ids to the passed lists.
      Parameters:
      listConditions - List with FHIR-conditions in which the entries from the bundle are to be stored.
      listEncounters - List with FHIR-conditions in which the entries from the bundle are to be stored and that are referencing on the conditions.
      outputPatientIds - List of ids of the Patient resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      outputEncounterIds - List of ids of the Encounter resource to be extended by entries from the Observation resource.
      serverType - The connected server type that delivers the fhir resources. At the moment just ServerTypeEnum.FHIR are supported.

    • extractCoreBaseDataOfFacilityEncounters

      public static List<CoreBaseDataItem> extractCoreBaseDataOfFacilityEncounters(AbstractDataRetrievalService dataRetrievalService) throws SearchException
      Throws:
      SearchException

    • handleConsentEntries

      public static void handleConsentEntries(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle currentBundle, List<MiiConsent> consents, Collection<MiiEncounter> encountersOutput, Set<String> outputPatientIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType)

    • handleBroadConsentEntries

      public static void handleBroadConsentEntries(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle currentBundle, List<MiiConsent> consents, ServerTypeEnum serverType)
      Processes all Broad Consent entries from the bundle, including revoked or otherwise non-valid entries. This is required because downstream logic determines the latest consent state per patient, so older valid entries alone would not reliably reflect the most recent consent status.

    • addValidConsentEntries

      public static void addValidConsentEntries(Collection<MiiConsent> consents, Collection<MiiEncounter> encountersOutput, Set<String> outputPatientIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle.BundleEntryComponent entry)

    • addValidBroadConsentEntries

      public static void addValidBroadConsentEntries(Collection<MiiConsent> consents, ServerTypeEnum serverType, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle.BundleEntryComponent entry)

    • addBroadConsentEntries

      public static void addBroadConsentEntries(Collection<MiiConsent> consents, ServerTypeEnum serverType, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Bundle.BundleEntryComponent entry)

    • isEncounterInpatientFacilityContact

      public static boolean isEncounterInpatientFacilityContact(MiiEncounter miiEncounter)

    • storeConsentPatientKeys

      public static void storeConsentPatientKeys(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Consent consent, Set<String> outputPatientIds, ServerTypeEnum serverType)

    • addDummyIcuLocationIfNeeded

      public static void addDummyIcuLocationIfNeeded(List<MiiEncounter> miiEncounters, List<MiiLocation> miiLocations)
      If at least one service provider entry was found in the encounter list the location list its possible that the icu transfer information is getting managed via this attribute. If so, we create references to a dummy icu location.

    • addDeceasedStatusToEncounters

      public static void addDeceasedStatusToEncounters(List<MiiPatient> miiPatients, List<MiiEncounter> miiEncounters)
      Adds a discharge disposition extension indicating "deceased" to encounters where the patient has died.

      This method first creates a map of deceased patients based on their ID and date of death. Then, it filters encounters that belong to these patients and checks whether the encounter period includes the deceased date. If the conditions match, a discharge disposition extension is added to the encounter.

      Parameters:
      miiPatients - The list of MiiPatient containing patient records.
      miiEncounters - The list of MiiEncounter representing encounters to be processed.

    • addDischargeDispositionDeadToEncounter

      public static void addDischargeDispositionDeadToEncounter(MiiEncounter encounter)
      Sets the discharge disposition of the given encounter to "deceased".

      This method always overwrites any existing hospitalization component with a new one containing the discharge disposition extension indicating death.

      Parameters:
      encounter - The MiiEncounter to update with a "deceased" discharge disposition.

    • isProcedureStatusValid

      public static boolean isProcedureStatusValid(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Procedure procedure)
      Filtering of not-done + entered-in-error observations.

    • getPidsByProceduresAndConditions

      public static List<String> getPidsByProceduresAndConditions(List<MiiProcedure> ukbProcedures, List<MiiCondition> ukbConditions)
